title: Kassy's Zombies
description: Minecraft Zombies with a new look
body:
_Requires either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)_

This pack adds a new look for the minecraft Zombies, with variants for all the player default skins!

Part of the ["Kassy's Remodeled Mobs"](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kassys-mobs) Series.
